TweakDesc_TitleBarColor: Tae pae taitara mai i te papamuri
TweakDesc_UnpinTaskbarShortcuts: Tangohia nga pokatata paetaumahi kua kohia
TweakDesc_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: Whirihorahia nga tautuhinga haumarutanga Adobe Reader
TweakDesc_UpdateDesktopRegistry: Tango i te tohu 'Mō tēnei pikitia' Spotlight mai i te papamahi
TweakDesc_UpdateDriver: Koreering of drivers through Windows Update
TweakDesc_UpdateEventLogSize: Whakanuia te rahinga rangitaki takahanga kia pai ake te arotautanga
TweakDesc_UpdateKeyExchanges: Whirihorahia nga huringa whakawhiti matua haumaru
TweakDesc_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Whiwhi whakahōu mō ētahi atu hua Microsoft
TweakDesc_UpdateMSProducts: Whiwhi whakahōu mō ētahi atu hua Microsoft mā Windows Update
TweakDesc_UpdateMSRT: Koreering of MSRT through Windows Update
TweakDesc_UpdateProtocols: Monokia deprecated TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 protocols
TweakDesc_UpdateRegistryPaths: Waihangahia nga ara rehita e hiahiatia ana i mua i te tautuhi i nga taonga
TweakDesc_UpdateRestart: Tīmata anō aunoa i muri i te Whakahōu Windows
TweakDesc_UseStoreOpenWith: 'Tirohia he taupānga kei roto i te Toa Microsoft' i Open With
TweakDesc_UWPAccountInfo: Te uru atu ki nga korero putea mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPApps: Tāuta nui, tango ranei i nga taupānga Toa Windows kua tohua
TweakDesc_UWPCalendar: Maramataka uru mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPCallHistory: Karangahia te uru hitori mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPContacts: Te urunga hoapā mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPDiagInfo: Te uru atu ki nga korero tirotiro mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPEmail: Te urunga imeera mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPFileSystem: Te uru ki te punaha konae mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPMessaging: Te urunga karere mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPNotifications: Te uru whakamohiotanga mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPOtherDevices: Ko etahi atu taputapu ka uru mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPPhoneCalls: Te uru waea mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPRadios: Nga reo irirangi (Nihokikorangi) uru mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPTasks: Te urunga mahi mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_UWPVoiceActivation: Te uru ki te whakahohe reo mai i nga taupānga UWP
TweakDesc_WAPPush: WAP Push karere mai i nga kaikawe
TweakDesc_WebLangList: Te tukutahitanga o nga reo tukutuku pai
TweakDesc_WebSearch: Ko te whakaurunga rapu paetukutuku ki te rapu punaha
TweakDesc_WhatsNewInWindows: He whakaaro mo te whai hua nui o Windows
TweakDesc_WindowsCapabilities: Whakarite or remove optional Windows capabilities via dialog
TweakDesc_WindowsFeatures: Whakahaerehia nga ahuatanga Windows ma te korero
TweakDesc_WindowsLatestUpdate: Tikina nga whakahou hou ina wa e waatea ana
TweakDesc_WindowsManageDefaultPrinter: Tukua a Windows ki te whakahaere i te pūreretā taunoa
TweakDesc_WindowsTips: Nga tohutohu me nga whakaaro ina whakamahi Windows
TweakDesc_WindowsWelcomeExperience: Ka mihi a Windows ki nga wheako whai muri i nga whakahoutanga
TweakerWarning: Tērā pea kua whakakorehia te tūāhuru o Windows mā te whakamahi i {0}. Tōngia anō a Windows mā tētahi āhua ISO tūturu anake.
TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: Ka whakaatu te Haumarutanga Windows i te whakatupato ki te kore koe e haina me te putea Microsoft. Ko te whakakore i tenei panui ka huna.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: Ka tautuhi i te awhe wa ka kore a Windows e whakaara aunoa i to PC ki te whakaoti i te whakauru whakahōu.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: Ka tuhi i to mahi puta noa i nga taputapu ka hainatia ki te putea Microsoft ka taea te tukutahi ki te kapua. Ko te whakakore i nga mahi ka noho rohe.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: Controls how User Account Control behaves when an app requests elevated privileges. Taunoa prompts for consent, Never disables UAC prompts. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: Ka taapirihia nga ture papaahi hei aukati i nga tono Adobe kia kore e uru ki te ipurangi. Ka pa tenei ki te whakamana raihana, te tukutahi kapua, me nga ahuatanga Creative Cloud. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: Ka waihangahia he pokatata papamahi ka whakaara ano i te PC ki te tahua Kōwhiringa Whakaoho Ake (Taiao Whakaora Matapihi).
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: Ka tautapahia e Windows tetahi TT panui ahurei ki to putea ka taea e nga taupānga te whakamahi hei whakaatu i nga panui kua whaaia. Ko te whakakore i tenei aroturuki ka mutu.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Shaking a window title bar minimizes all other open windows. Monokia if you find this triggers by accident during normal use.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Sets the default color mode that applications use when they respect the system setting: Pōuri or Marama.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: Ka taea e Windows te mahara me te huri ki tetahi reo whakauru rereke, tahora papapātuhi ranei mo ia matapihi tono.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: Ka taea e Windows te whakauru wahangu i nga taupānga whakaaro ki te papamuri me te kore patai atu ki a koe. Ma te whakakore i tenei whanonga. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: Ka tirotirohia e SmartScreen nga konae me nga taupānga kua tangohia ki runga i te putunga ingoa ingoa kapua me te whakatupato i a koe i mua i te whakahaere i nga kaikawe kaore e mohiotia. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka whakatuwhera aunoa a Windows i te tere, ka whakarewahia ranei he taupānga ina whakauru koe i te puku USB, i etahi atu papaahoa tango ranei.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Ina tukinga a Windows (mata puru), ka taea te whakaara aunoa. Ko te whakakore i te hapa kei runga i te mata ka taea e koe te panui i te waehere aukati.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: Ka whakahaere mena ka whakaaehia nga taupānga kia rere me te whakahou i te papamuri karekau i te aro. Ko te whakakore i te PTM me te mahara. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Ka taea e te pouaka rapu Tahua Tīmata te whakaatu i nga hua tukutuku Bing i te taha o nga hua o te rohe. Ko te whakakore ka pupuri i te Rapu Tahua Tīmata paetata anake.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: Ka whakahaere mena ka uru aunoa a Windows ki te aratau whakaora i muri i nga nganatanga whawhai i rahua. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: Monokias Brave browser's optional extras: rewards, crypto wallet, VPN, and AI chat. Kialy affects these Brave-specific features, not your browsing. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: Whakaatus the specific error code on the blue screen of death instead of just the generic sad face emoji.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Ka whakaatu i te tau hanga Windows me te putanga hei tohuwai i te kokonga matau o raro o to papamahi.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: Adds an Whakarite option to the right-click context menu for .cab archive files.
TweakWhy_Camera: Takahuri Matua ki te whakahaere mena ka tono tono uru ki to kamera. Ko te whakakore i nga taupānga katoa ka aukati i te whakamahi i te kamera. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka whakahohea te kī Caps Lock. Ko te whakakorenga ka maataki ano i te kī Caps Lock na te pehi ka kore he aha.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka taea e nga kaiwhakamahi te huri i te kaupapa tangi o Windows. Ko te whakakore i tenei ka maukati te kaupapa o naianei me te aukati i nga huringa.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: Whakaatus small checkboxes next to files and folders in Explorer to make it easier to select multiple items without holding Ctrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: Ko WinGet te kaiwhakahaere kete whakaurunga a Windows hei whakauru me te whakahou i nga taupānga mai i te raina whakahau. Ma tenei ka whakarite kia whakauruhia me te mea hou.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Ko te tapatahi o te waehere kua parea e te Hypervisor e whakahaere ana i te waehere kernel Windows i roto i te taiao mariko hei aukati i te kino o te taumata-kero me nga rootkits. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: Ka ūkui aunoa i te rārangi kōnae o nā tata nei ia wā ka takiputa koe. Ka whakapai ake i te tūmataitinga ki nga miihini tiritahi, maha-kaiwhakamahi ranei.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: Stores a history of copied items so you can paste from previous clips using Win+V. Whakamarautia to turn this feature on.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: Whakaatus or hides the Compressed (zipped) Folder option in the right-click New submenu in File Explorer.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: Whakaaetia tenei PC ki te tiri i tana hononga ipurangi ki etahi atu taputapu, ka mahi hei wahi wera rorohiko. Ko te whakahohe ka whakaatu i tenei whiringa ki nga tautuhinga whatunga. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: Ka tautuhi i te kāhua whakaatu taunoa mo te Paewhiri Mana ki nga Ata Nui, Ata Iti, te whakarōpū Kāwai taunoa ranei.
TweakWhy_Copilot: Ka tango i te Copilot, Recall, me nga waahanga Windows AI katoa e pa ana. Me whakauru ano ki te winget, ki te toa ranei a Microsoft Store.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: Ka aukati a Cortana ki te whakarewa aunoa i te tiimatanga. Ka taea tonu te whakatuwhera a Cortana ki te hiahiatia.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: Ka waihanga i tetahi waahi Whakaora Pūnaha Windows kia taea ai e koe te huri whakamuri i nga huringa punaha mena ka he. Ka tūtohuhia i mua i te whakahaere i nga tweaks.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: Lets you resume tasks from other Windows devices on this PC via a notification pop-up. Monokia if you do not use this cross-device feature.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: Ka tautuhi i te kōtaha whatunga mo to hononga e hohe ana. Ka taea e te Maataki te rapu whatunga me te tiritahi, Ka herea e te iwi. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: Ka tautuhi ko tehea tono kapeka ka tuwhera ina whakarewahia e koe te Whakatairanga Whakatairanga, PowerShell ranei mai i roto o Windows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: Ka whakatuwhera i nga ripa tirotiro a Edge i roto i tetahi miihini mariko motuhake hei aukati i nga paetukutuku kino kia uru atu ki te punaha manaaki, ki ana konae ranei. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: Whakamarautias Microsoft Defender's cloud-based protection for real-time threat lookups using Microsoft's global threat intelligence database. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: Ka whakahaere i te miihini wheori Microsoft Defender i roto i te tukanga pouaka kirikiri mo te whakamarumaru atu. Ka taapirihia he mahinga iti ki runga. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: Whakaatus or hides the Windows Security (Defender) icon in the system tray. Hiding it does not disable Defender protection.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: Ka taea e Windows te whakamahi i to PC ki te tiri i nga raraunga tikiake Windows Update ki etahi atu PC i runga i to whatunga, i te ipurangi ranei. Ko te whakakore i to tango ake ka noho motuhake. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: Ka tautuhi i te Aukati Whakamahinga Raraunga ki te aratau Whakaputa, ka taea te whakamarumaru DEP mo nga tukanga katoa engari ko nga mea ka whakakorehia e koe. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: Whakahaerehia te nui o nga raraunga tātaritanga ka tukuna e Windows ki a Microsoft. Ka tukuna e Minimal nga korero mo te taputapu me nga raraunga pono.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: Ko te ratonga DiagTrack he kohi me te tuku i te whakamahinga o Windows me nga raraunga tātaritanga ki nga tūmau Microsoft. Ko te whakakorenga ka mutu te tukunga waea waea papamuri. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: Monokias older weak AES cipher entries in the Windows SCHANNEL security layer. Forces applications to negotiate stronger cipher configurations. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: Ka aukati i a Windows ki te whakahaere aunoa i nga papatono i runga i nga puku USB me etahi atu pāpāho tango. Ka aukati i tetahi vector horapa kino kino.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: Configures SCHANNEL hash algorithm settings. Monokias MD5 and enables SHA family algorithms for stronger integrity verification. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: Monokias the IPv6 protocol stack system-wide. Kuputaka if your network does not use IPv6 to reduce unnecessary attack surface. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: Monokias RC2 and RC4 ciphers in SCHANNEL. These algorithms are cryptographically broken and should not be used in any TLS connection. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: Ko te DCOM he kawa whakahohe mamao e hiahiatia ana e nga taputapu whakahaere hinonga (SCCM, WMI). Ko te whakakore i te reira ka whakaiti i te mata whakaeke engari ka pakaru pea nga rerengamahi whakahaere mamao.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: Turns off SMB compression to protect against CVE-2020-0796. Kialy affects SMB traffic compression, not file access speed. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: Ka tango i nga korero tohu waahi TCP mai i nga paatete whatunga. Ka aukati i nga punaha mamao mai i te tarai maihao i to OS i runga i te waa mahi. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: Monokias Triple DES (3DES) in SCHANNEL. 3DES is vulnerable to SWEET32 birthday attacks and is no longer considered secure. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: Ka whakahaere i te taputapu Whakapai Kōpae Windows ki roto ki te tango i nga konae rangitahi, te keteroki punaha, me etahi atu raraunga kore e hiahiatia hei whakawātea mokowā kōpae. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: Ka tango i te tere auau i roto i te Haumarutanga Windows e tono ana kia haina koe me te putea Microsoft mo etahi atu whakamarumaru.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: Ka tango i te tere auau i roto i te Haumarutanga Windows e tono ana kia taea e koe te tātari ingoa SmartScreen.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: Whakamuna i nga rapunga DNS ma te tuku ma runga HTTPS hei utu UDP. Ka aukati i to ISP, whatunga ranei mai i te tirotiro, i te raweke ranei i nga hokohoko DNS. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: Ka whakahaere mena ka tohuhia e te Haumarutanga Windows nga konae kua tikiakehia he kore haumaru ma te whakamahi i te awa raraunga rereke Zone.Identifier.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: Ka whakamahi i nga tautuhinga Kaupapahere Rōpū ki te whakakore i te waea waea, te kaiawhina hokohoko, nga kohinga, te Paetaha Taapiri, me etahi atu taapiri Edge. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: Whakaatus or hides the Edit with Clipchamp video editor option in the right-click context menu for video files.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: Whakaatus or hides the Edit with Paint option in the right-click context menu for image files.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: Whakaatus or hides the Edit with Photos option in the right-click context menu for image files.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: Whakamarautias enhanced anti-spoofing for Windows Hello facial recognition. Kialy applies if you have compatible biometric hardware.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: Whakaaetia nga hononga SMB ki nga tiri whatunga me te kore e hiahia motuhēhēnga. E hiahiatia ana mo te uru atu ki nga taputapu NAS tawhito, nga kaituhi, nga pouara ranei. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: Whakaatus encrypted files in green and compressed files in blue in File Explorer. Makes these file types immediately identifiable.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Mouse acceleration that adjusts cursor speed based on how fast you physically move the mouse. Monokia for consistent raw mouse input, recommended for gaming.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Ina tukinga te tono, ka taea e te Ripoata Hapa Windows te tuku purongo ki a Microsoft. Ko te whakakore i tenei raraunga mai i te wehe atu i to miihini.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: Ka waihangahia he tirohanga ritenga i roto i te Tirohanga Takahanga kua tātarihia hei whakaatu i nga kaupapa hangahanga, kia maamaa ake te arotake he aha nga kaupapa i whakarewahia.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: Ka kitea e te File Explorer te momo ihirangi o ia kōpaki ka hoatu he tauira tirohanga rite. Ko te whakakore i te maukati i nga kōpaki katoa ki te tirohanga whanui.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: Whakaatus the complete folder path in the File Explorer title bar instead of just the folder name. Useful when working with many folders of the same name.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Ma te pehi i te F1 i te File Explorer, i runga ranei i te papamahi ka tuwhera te paetukutuku awhina Windows i to tirotiro. Ko te whakakore i te whakarewatanga o tenei pūtirotiro.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: Whakamarautias the legacy F8 key boot menu that lets you select Safe Mode and other startup options during the Windows boot process.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: He aratau whakaweto ranu hei whakaora i te ahua kernel ki te kōpae kia tere ake ai te putu o Windows. Ka puta he take ki nga tatūnga rua-boota, ki te kati katoa ranei.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: Ka whakahaere i te maha o te tono a Windows ki a koe ki te whakatau i to wheako, ki te tuku urupare ranei. Tautuhinga ki Kaua rawa e mutu nga urupare urupare katoa.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: Whakaatus a confirmation dialog before permanently deleting a file. Whakamarautia to get a prompt before files are sent to the Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: Ka whakaiti i te mokowā i waenga i ngā tūemi i te Pūtirotiro Kōnae mō te mātotoru ake, te nui ake o ngā tiro rārangi whai kiko.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: Whakaatus the file extension (e.g. .txt, .exe) after every filename in Explorer. Helps identify what type a file is at a glance.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: Whakaatus the detailed progress dialog for file operations (copy, move, delete) by default instead of the minimal progress bar.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka whakaatu te kape o te konae me te whakawhiti korero i nga korero katoa penei i te tere me te wa e toe ana ma te taunoa.
TweakWhy_Firewall: Whakamarautias or disables Windows Defender Firewall across all network profiles. Disabling leaves all inbound ports completely unfiltered. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: Whakaatus a brief welcome animation and the Hi screen the first time you sign in after a major Windows update.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: Ka whakatuwhera i ia matapihi kōpaki Explorer i roto i tana ake tukanga. Mena ka pakaru tetahi, ka noho tuwhera etahi. He paku ake te pumahara.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka whakarōpūhia nga konae kei roto i te kōpaki Tikiake ma te ra i whakarereketia. Ko te tautuhinga ki te Kore e whakaatu ana i nga konae katoa i te rarangi papatahi.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: He ahuatanga Windows e arotau ana i nga keemu me nga taupānga e rere ana i te aratau mata-katoa kia pai ake te mahi. Ka taea e te mono te whakatika i nga take hototahi i etahi keemu tawhito.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Ko te rekoata papamuri ka mau tonu i nga mahi whakaari kia taea ai e koe te tiaki i nga meneti whakamutunga i muri i te paahitanga o tetahi mea. Ko te whakakore i nga rauemi GPU me te kōpae kia pai ake te rite o te FPS.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Ma te whakahōtaka GPU tere-whakatere ka taea e te GPU te whakahaere tika i tana ake mahara ataata, tera pea ka whakaiti i te roanga whakauru i roto i nga keemu.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: Ka tiakina nga mea katoa o te RAM ki te kōpae me te whakaweto katoa i te PC. Ka taea e te konae moe moe te whakamahi i etahi gigabytes mokowā kōpae.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: Whakaatus files and folders that are marked as hidden in File Explorer. Hidden items appear slightly transparent when visible.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Ko nga Roopu Kainga he waahanga Windows mo te tiri i nga konae i waenga i nga PC kaainga. I tangohia i roto Windows 10 1803 engari kei te noho tonu nga toenga ratonga.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: Ka tikiake me te kawemai i te konae kaupapa here whakangenge i te mahi i mua i te hanga ki roto i te Kaitiaki Whakamahi Kaiwawao Windows, me te whakamahi i nga tikanga whakahekenga ritenga. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: Ka tautuhi i te tikanga whakauru papapātuhi taunoa e whakamahia ana e Windows. Ka kaha te reo Ingarihi ki te whakatakotoranga reo Ingarihi ahakoa etahi atu reo kua whakauruhia.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: Ka kōpeketia e Windows ngā pepapātū JPEG ina whakaritea hei papamuri papamahi. Ko te tautuhi ki te Max ka mau tonu te kounga o te ahua.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: Allows websites to read your Windows language preference list to tailor content. Monokia to prevent websites from detecting your language settings.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Guest authentication for SMB is a known lateral-movement vector disabled by default since Windows 10 1709. Enabling it exposes the system to unauthenticated SMB access. Kialy enable for legacy device compatibility.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: Whakahauhia nga tono moka-32 me te moka-64 ki te whakamahi i te putanga hou o te wa whakahaere .NET kua whakauruhia hei utu mo te putanga i hangaia i te tuatahi.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: Hono-Local Multicast Name Resolution ka whakatau i nga ingoa kaihautu i runga i nga whatunga rohe. Ka taea te whakamahi i roto i nga whakaeke hopu whaimana me te tino monokia. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: Runs the Windows LSA process in protected mode to prevent credential theft by tools like Mimikatz. Kuputaka for all systems. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_LocationService: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka uru atu nga taupānga ki te waahi matawhenua o to taputapu. Ko te whakakore i te waahi ka aukati i te aroturuki tauwāhi e nga taupānga katoa. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka whakaatuhia te mata maukati Windows i mua i te mata takiuru ki runga Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: Ka hoatu he awenga kiriaku ki te papamuri mata takiuru. Ko te mono ka whakaatu i te papamuri me te kore e rangirua.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: Ka whakahaere mena ka whakaatuhia te mata maukati Windows i mua i te mata takiuru ki runga Windows 10 (ara kaupapa here era RS1).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: Ka taapirihia e te Windows Web Experience Pack etahi widget me nga ihirangi hihiri ki te mata maukati me te paetaumahi. Ko te mono ka tango i enei.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: Ka taea e Windows te whakaara i to PC mai i te moe mo te po ki te whakahaere i nga mahi tiaki aunoa. Ko te whakakore i nga oho ohorere mo te po.
TweakWhy_MapUpdates: Ka taea e nga Mahere Windows te tango aunoa i nga raraunga mapi tuimotu kua whakahoutia ki muri. Ko te whakakore i te bandwidth ki te kore koe e whakamahi i te taupānga Mahere.
TweakWhy_MeetNow: Meet Now icon i te waahi whakamohiotanga
TweakWhy_MergeConflicts: Whakaatus a warning when merging folders that contain files with the same name. Monokia to silently overwrite files without a prompt.
TweakWhy_Microphone: Takahuri Matua hei whakahaere mena ka taea e nga taupānga te tono uru ki to hopuorooro. Ko te whakakore i nga taupānga katoa ka aukati i te whakamahi i te hopuoro. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_MostUsedApps: Whakaatus your most frequently launched apps at the top of the Start Menu app list for quick access.
TweakWhy_MostUsedStartApps: Ko te nuinga o nga taupānga e whakamahia ana i te Tīmata
TweakWhy_MouseAcceleration: Whakarei ake i te Tohu Tohu Whakanuia te nekehanga kiore i runga i te tere. Ko te whakakore i te 1:1 te ōwehenga tāuru mata e paingia ana e nga kaitakaro FPS whakataetae mo te whainga.
TweakWhy_MSIExtractContext: Tāpirihia he kōwhiringa Tango ki te tahua horopaki pāwhiri-matau mō ngā kōnae pūtāuta .msi, ka tuku koe ki te tirotiro i o ratou ihirangi me te kore e whakahaere i te kaitāuta.
TweakWhy_MSNetClient: Ko te kiritaki Microsoft Networks e taea ai e tenei PC te uru atu ki nga konae me nga kaituhi e tiritiria ana e etahi atu rorohiko Windows i te whatunga. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_MultiplaneOverlay: He waahanga tito GPU ka taea te whakapai ake i nga mahi. Ka taea e te monokia te whakatika i nga riipene tirohanga, i te korikori ranei i etahi whirihoranga whakaatu.
TweakWhy_MultipleInvokeContext: I te wa e whiriwhiri ana i nga konae 15 neke atu ranei me te paato-matau, ka whakaatuhia e Windows he whakatupato i mua i te whakaatu i te tahua horopaki. Ma tenei ka hiki, ka tango ranei i taua rohe.
TweakWhy_NaglesAlgorithm: Reduces network buffering so packets are sent immediately. Can lower latency in competitive multiplayer, but may affect connection stability on some networks. Monokia if you notice connection drops.
TweakWhy_NavigationPaneExpand: Ka whakawhānui aunoa te pihanga whakaterenga Explorer me te panuku ki te whakanui i te kōpaki e tiro ana koe.
TweakWhy_NavPaneAllFolders: Whakaatus all local folders including hidden system folders in the Explorer left navigation pane.
TweakWhy_NavPaneLibraries: Whakaatus the Libraries section (Documents, Music, Pictures, Videos) in the Explorer left navigation pane.
TweakWhy_NCSIProbe: Ko te Tohu Tūnga Hononga Whatunga ka taki i te hononga ma te pinging ki nga tūmau Microsoft. Ko te whakakore ka whakaatu he nga tohu mana whatunga. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_NetBIOS: Ko NetBIOS he kawa taumira ingoa tawhito e whakamahia ana mo te tiritahi konae Windows. Ko te whakakore i nga whatunga hou e whakaiti ana i nga hokohoko haapurororaa kore. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_NetDevicesAutoInst: Ka whakahaere mena ka tango aunoa a Windows me te whakauru i nga taraiwa mo nga taputapu whatunga hou.
TweakWhy_NetworkAdaptersSavePower: Whakaaetia a Windows ki te whakauru i nga urutau whatunga ki te ahua iti-hiko ina mangere. Ko te mono ka aukati i te whakaroa poto i muri i te oho o te urutau.
TweakWhy_NetworkDiscovery: Whakamarautias this PC to find other devices on the local network and be visible to them. Required for browsing network shares in File Explorer. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_NetworkFromLockScreen: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka kitea te paatene whiriwhiri whatunga ki te mata maukati i mua i te hainatanga o te kaiwhakamahi.
TweakWhy_NetworkProtection: Ko te whakamarumaru whatunga a Microsoft Defender e aukati ana i nga hononga ki nga rohe kino e mohiotia ana me nga wahitau IP i te taumata whatunga. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_NewAppPrompt: Ka ngana koe ki te whakatuwhera i tetahi momo konae kore hono, ka whakaatu a Windows i tetahi korero e patai ana me pehea te whakatuwhera. Ko te whakakore i tenei tohu ka pehi.
TweakWhy_NewOutlook: Controls whether the new Outlook app is available. Monokia to keep using the classic Mail and Calendar apps instead.
TweakWhy_NewsInterests: Nga korero me nga korero huarere kei runga i te paetaumahi
TweakWhy_Notifications: Whakawhiti matua mo te punaha panui Windows katoa. Ko te whakakore i nga whakamohiotanga taupānga katoa ka huna i te pokapū panui. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_NTFSLastAccess: Whakahōuhia he tohuwā ki ia kōnae ia wa ka panuitia. Ko te whakakore i nga mahi tuhi kōpae i runga i nga punaha he maha nga panui konae iti.
TweakWhy_NTFSLongPaths: Ka tango i te tepe 260-puāhua i runga i nga ara konae. E hiahiatia ana mo etahi taputapu whanaketanga me nga hanganga kōpaki hohonu.
TweakWhy_NumLock: Controls whether the Num Lock key is automatically turned on when Windows starts. Whakamarautia to always start with the number pad active.
TweakWhy_OneDrive: Ka tāuta i te kirimana tūhono papa tūmahi OneDrive, ka tangohia rānei te tono me tōna hono ki Explorer. Ko te tango ko tētahi tukanga tangohanga kōpae, ehara i te hurihanga ngāwari — ko te whakahoki mai ka hiahia ana ki te whakahāpai i te tautuhi, ki te takiuru anō, ki te tatari kia ūkui ai te tūhono.
TweakWhy_OneDriveFileExplorerAd: Ka whakaatu a OneDrive i tetahi panui whakatairanga i roto i te File Explorer e akiaki ana i a koe ki te tukutahi i nga konae. Ma te huna ka tangohia tenei kara.
TweakWhy_OpenFileExplorerTo: Ka tautuhi i te tauwāhi taunoa ka tuwhera te File Explorer ki te whakarewatanga mai i te paetaumahi, Tahua Tīmata ranei.
TweakWhy_OpenWindowsTerminalAdminContext: Whakatuwherahia a Windows Terminal hei kaiwhakahaere taunoa
TweakWhy_OpenWindowsTerminalContext: 'Tuwhera ki te Windows Terminal' tahua horopaki
TweakWhy_PerformanceTuning: Ka whakahaere i te huinga arotautanga o nga punaha tuku iho me nga whakatikatika whirihoranga whawhai hei whakapai ake i te aro o te punaha. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_PowerPlan: Sets the Windows power plan. Balanced scales performance based on load. Tiketike Performance keeps the CPU at full speed. Ultimate Performance removes all power-saving throttling for maximum throughput. Ultimate Performance may not be available on all systems.
TweakWhy_Powershell7Telemetry: PowerShell 7 sends anonymous usage data to Microsoft by default. Disabling opts out of this telemetry. Linked to the Whakarite/Update PowerShell 7 option.
TweakWhy_PowerShellModulesLogging: Ka takitaki ia tono e whakahaeretia ana e nga waahanga PowerShell ki te rangitaki takahanga Windows. He pai mo te arowhai haumaru me te tirotiro i nga aitua.
TweakWhy_PowerShellScriptsLogging: Ka takitaki i nga korero katoa o ia paraka tuhi PowerShell ka mahia ki te rangitaki takahanga Windows. Ka awhina i nga rangahau i muri i nga aitua.
TweakWhy_PreventEdgeShortcutCreation: Ka aukati a Microsoft Edge ki te hanga ano i tana pokatata papamahi i muri i nga whakahoutanga. Ka pa ki nga hongere tuku Edge katoa.
TweakWhy_PrintCMDContext: Whakaatus or hides the Print option in the right-click context menu for .bat and .cmd script files.
TweakWhy_ProtectClickOnce: Monokias ClickKiace trust prompts for all security zones. Prevents untrusted ClickKiace applications from prompting for installation. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectFileSystemPerformance: Monokias 8.3 short filename generation on NTFS. Improves filesystem performance and removes a legacy compatibility feature rarely needed today.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOffice: Restricts macros, external content execution, and Outlook trust settings across Koreice versions. Reduces document-based attack vectors. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOfficeLinks: Ka aukati i a Word ki te whakahou aunoa i nga hononga o waho ki nga tuhinga me nga imeera. Ka whakaitihia te morearea o te tangohanga raraunga ma nga hononga tuhinga whakauru. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_ProtectOS: Ka whakamahi i te huinga whanui o nga uara whakapakeke rehita e kapi ana i te whakamarumarutanga o te tiwhikete, UAC, NTLM, TCP/IP, me te whanonga tango kaari atamai. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_ProtectRPCSurface: Monokias RPC-over-TCP for Task Scheduler and the remote Service Control Manager. Reduces exposure for remote management attack paths. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectWinRM: Monokias unencrypted WinRM traffic and digest authentication, then restarts the WinRM service. Ensures remote management connections are always encrypted. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_PrtScnSnippingTool: Whakatuwherahia te Taahi Mata Panui i te Utauta Tipu mo te hopu mata tauwhitiwhiti, kaua ki te kape wahangu ki te papatopenga.
TweakWhy_PUAppsDetection: Whakamarautias Defender to detect and quarantine potentially unwanted applications such as adware, bundleware, and browser hijackers. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_QoS: Ka taea e te Kaihōtaka kete Kounga o te Ratonga te whakarite i etahi momo hokohoko whatunga. E hiahiatia ana kia mahi tika etahi ahuatanga QoS whatunga.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessFrequentFolders: The Quick Access section in Explorer can show frequently visited folders. Whakahune to keep Quick Access showing only your pinned folders.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessRecentFiles: The Quick Access section in Explorer can show recently opened files. Whakahune to keep Quick Access showing only your pinned folders.
TweakWhy_RazerBlock: Ka aukati i nga tuhinga kaiwhakauru Razer Synapse kia kore e rere aunoa. Ka aukati i te whakaurunga o te rorohiko Razer kore i te papamuri. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_RecentFiles: Controls whether Windows tracks recently accessed files for display in Quick Access and Open dialogs. Monokia to stop this tracking.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedApps: Whakaatus a list of recently installed apps in the Start Menu. Monokia to keep the Start Menu app list cleaner.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedStartApps: Ko nga taupānga kua taapiri ake nei ki te Tīmata
TweakWhy_RecentShortcuts: Whakaatus recently and frequently accessed files and folders as shortcuts in the Explorer Quick Access section.
TweakWhy_RecommendedTroubleshooting: Controls whether Windows automatically runs troubleshooters when problems are detected. Taunoa still asks for your permission before running.
TweakWhy_RecycleBinDeleteConfirmation: Whakaatus a confirmation prompt before moving files to the Recycle Bin. Whakamarautia to prevent accidental deletion.
TweakWhy_RegistryBackup: Whakamarautias automatic periodic backup of the Windows registry hive files to the RegBack folder inside the Windows directory.
TweakWhy_RepairSharedPrinterConnectionEr: Ka whakatika i nga rahunga hononga o te kaihautu me te taha-kiritaki-taha-kiritaki na roto i te whakahāngai i te RPC, te SMB, te Tohu me te Tā, te kaitapahi, te TCP, me nga tautuhinga kitenga whatunga. He iti noa te tupono o tenei huringa, me whakaara ano.
TweakWhy_RepairWindows11SMBUpdateIssue: Ka whakatika i tetahi take e mohiotia ana i roto i etahi Windows 11 ka hanga i te waahi ka ngaro te urunga tiritiri a SMB i muri i te whakahoutanga na te ngaro o te uara rehita.
TweakWhy_ReservedStorage: Ka rahuitia e Windows etahi gigabytes mokowā mokowā kōpae mō ngā whakahōutanga, ngā kōnae rangitahi, me ngā keteroki. Ko te whakakore i tenei waahi kua rahuitia i muri i te whakahou ka whai ake. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_RestartDeviceAfterUpdate: Whakaaetia a Windows ki te whakarite i te whakaara ano i muri i te otinga o te whakaurunga whakahou.
TweakWhy_RestartNotification: Whakaatus a notification in the taskbar when a Windows Update has been installed and requires a restart to complete.
TweakWhy_RestoreFldrWindows: Ka whakatuwhera ano i nga matapihi kōpaki Explorer i tuwhera i te wa i puta atu ai koe. Ka whakaora i to horopaki mahi i ia takiuru.
TweakWhy_RevertStartMenu: Ka whakahoki i te Tahua Tīmata ki te tahora i mua i te 24H2 ki runga Windows 11 Ka hanga 24H2. Ka pa ki te hototahitanga me nga whakahōu Windows a meake nei. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_S3Sleep: Ko te S3 he moe hohonu tuku iho i reira te PC e whakakaha ana i nga waahanga. Ko etahi o nga punaha taunoa ki a Modern Standby ka taea te whakaheke hiko i te wa e mangere ana.
TweakWhy_SaveRestartableApps: Ka taea e Windows te tiaki i te ahua o nga taupānga tuwhera ina waitohu koe me te whakatuwhera aunoa i a raatau i muri i to hainatanga e whai ake nei.
TweakWhy_SaveZoneInformation: Ina tango koe i tetahi konae mai i te ipurangi, ka tohua e Windows ki te tohu rohe. Ma te pupuri i tenei ka taea nga whakatupato i te wa e whakahaere ana nga konae kua tikiakehia.
TweakWhy_ScheduledTasks: He maha nga mahi kua whakaritea ki muri hei kohi me te tuku i nga raraunga tātaritanga. Ko te whakakore i enei mahi ka kore e rere aunoa. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_SearchAppInStore: Ina whakatuwhera koe i tetahi konae me te toronga e mohiotia ana, ka taea e Windows te whakaaro kia titiro koe ki te Toa Microsoft. Ko te whakakore i tenei whakaaro ka pekehia.
TweakWhy_SearchHighlights: Rapua nga mea nui i roto i te Rapu Windows
TweakWhy_SecondsInSystemClock: Hekona i runga i te karaka paetaumahi
TweakWhy_SelectCheckboxes: Ka taapirihia nga pouakataki ki te taha o nga konae me nga kōpaki i te Explorer kia ngawari ake te kowhiringa-maha me te kore e pupuri Ctrl.
TweakWhy_Sensors: Ka whakahaere i te uru ki nga pūoko taputapu penei i te whakatere, te gyroscope, me te pūoko marama ambient. Ko te nuinga e tika ana mo nga papa me nga taputapu hurihuri.
TweakWhy_ServicesManual: Ka tautuhi i te kowhiringa o nga ratonga Windows kore-tikanga mai i Aunoa ki te whakaoho-a-ringa. Ka timata tonu nga ratonga ina hiahiatia. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_SetDefenderExploitGuardPolicy: Ka hoatu etahi atu ture whakaheke mata whakaekea a Exploit Guard ma te Windows Defender hei aukati i nga tikanga kino noa. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_SetDLLHijackingPrevention: Ka whirihora i te raupapa rapu DLL Kaiwhakahaere Wātū kia kore e utaina nga tono DLL mai i nga waahi kore pono. Katia he ara tuku malware noa. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_SetLOLBinFirewallRules: Ka taapiri atu i nga ture paraka paahi ki waho mo nga taarua-rua Windows kua mahia e te kino (LOLBins) ki te waea ki te kainga, ki te tango i nga utu utu. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_SetNtpServerOverride: Ka takahia te Wa Windows ki te whakamahi pool.ntp.org hei utu mo te tūmau wa Windows taunoa.
TweakWhy_SetSMBSharingCompatibility: Ka pupuri i to whirihoranga tiri SMB me nga tohu whatunga kua tiakina ina whakamahia etahi atu tweaks whatunga. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_SettingsSuggestedContent: Ka taea e te taupānga Tautuhinga te whakaatu i nga whakaaro tautoko me nga tohutohu i te taha o o tautuhinga. Ka tangohia e te huna tenei ihirangi whakatairanga.
TweakWhy_SetWindowsFirewallLogging: Whakamarautias logging of dropped and allowed connections to the Windows Firewall log file so you can audit network activity.
TweakWhy_SharedExperiences: Tukua a Windows ki te tiri mahi i waenga i o taputapu ma to putea Microsoft. Ko te whakakore i te mahi ka noho rohe ki tenei miihini anake.
TweakWhy_ShareMenu: Ka taapirihia he whiringa Tiri ki te tahua horopaki paato-matau mo nga konae, ka tuku koe ki te tiri ma nga taupānga, ma te tiritahi tata ranei a Windows.
TweakWhy_SharingMappedDrives: Whakaaetia nga puku whatunga kua mapi kia kitea ki nga tukanga teitei (kaiwhakahaere) tae atu ki te kaiwhakamahi kua uru mai. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_SharingWizard: Whakamarautias the simplified file sharing wizard when you right-click a file or folder and choose to share it.
TweakWhy_ShortcutArrow: Whakaatus or hides the small arrow overlay icon on shortcut files to indicate they are shortcuts and not the original files.
TweakWhy_ShortcutsSuffix: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka taapiri a Windows - Pokatata ki te ingoa o nga pokatata hou i hangaia ki te papamahi.
TweakWhy_ShutdownFromLockScreen: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka kitea nga paatene kati me te whakaara ano i te mata maukati Windows.
TweakWhy_SigninInfo: Uses your sign-in credentials to automatically finish setting up your profile after a Windows update. Monokia for more privacy.
TweakWhy_SleepButton: Ka whakahaere mēnā ka puta te kōwhiringa Moe ki te Tahua Tīmata, ā, kei te hohe te pātene papapātuhi moe.
TweakWhy_SleepTimeout: Controls when the display turns off and when the PC enters sleep mode after inactivity. Monokia to prevent automatic sleep.
TweakWhy_SMB1: SMBv1 is an outdated and vulnerable file sharing protocol known for EternalBlue exploits. Monokia unless required for very old network devices. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SMBServer: Whakamarautias the SMB file server component that lets other computers on the network access shared folders and printers on this PC. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SnapAssist: When you snap a window to one side, Windows suggests other open windows to fill the remaining space. Monokia to snap without suggestions.
TweakWhy_StandbyFix: Ka taea e Standby Hou (S0) te nui o te PTM me te whakamahi hiko i te ahua o te PC e moe ana. Ka huri tenei whakatika ki te ahua S3 mo te moe hohonu.
TweakWhy_StartAccountNotifications: Ka taea e Microsoft te whakaatu i nga whakamohiotanga e pa ana ki nga kaute me nga akiaki i te Tahua Tīmata. Ko te huna ka tango i enei.
TweakWhy_StartLayout: Ka whakahaere i te ōwehenga tahora o te Tahua Timata Windows 11 i waenga i nga taupānga kua pinea me nga ihirangi kua tohua.
TweakWhy_StartMenuAllSectionCategories: Wāhanga katoa me ngā kāwai i Tīmata (24H2+)
TweakWhy_StartRecommendationsTips: Ka taea e te Tahua Tīmata te whakaatu tohutohu mo nga ahuatanga Windows me nga taunakitanga mo nga taupānga hou. Ma te huna e tango enei whakaaro.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendedSection: Whakaatus or hides the Kuputaka section at the bottom of the Start Menu. Kia Enterprise and Education editions this can be hidden via policy.
TweakWhy_StartupSound: Ka purei i te tangi whakaoho Windows ina ka uta te papamahi i muri i to takiuru.
TweakWhy_StickyShift: Pressing Shift five times quickly triggers the Sticky Keys accessibility dialog. Monokia to prevent this from interrupting your work.
TweakWhy_StorageSense: Ka whakawātea aunoatia te mokowā kōpae i runga i te wātaka mā te muku i ngā kōnae rangitahi, ngā tikiake tawhito, me ngā ihirangi Ipu Para.
TweakWhy_Superfetch: SysMain preloads frequently used apps into RAM to speed up launch times. Kia SSDs it provides little benefit and can usually be safely disabled. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SuperHiddenFiles: Whakaatus protected Windows system files in File Explorer. These are hidden by default to prevent accidental modification or deletion.
TweakWhy_SuspendAirstrikeAttack: Whakahunes the network selection UI from the Windows lock screen. Prevents changing network settings before signing in. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SyncNotifications: OneDrive and other sync providers can show promotional notifications inside Explorer. Monokia to hide these banners.
TweakWhy_TailoredExperiences: Ka whakamahi i o raraunga tātaritanga hei whakaatu i nga tohutohu, nga panui, me nga taunakitanga a Microsoft. Ko te whakakore i a koe ki waho.
TweakWhy_TaskbarCombine: Me pehea te whakarōpūhia nga paatene paetaumahi
TweakWhy_TaskbarEndTask: Tāpiri Tūmahi Whakamutunga ki te tahua horopaki paetaumahi
TweakWhy_TaskbarWidgets: Paatene widget i runga i te paetaumahi
TweakWhy_TaskManagerDetails: Ka whakatuwhera tika i te Kaiwhakahaere Tūmahi ki te ripa Taipitopito e whakaatu ana i nga tukanga katoa, kaua ki te tirohanga whakarāpopototanga ngawari.
TweakWhy_TaskViewButton: Pātene Tiro Mahi i runga i te paetaumahi
TweakWhy_Teredo: Ko Teredo he kawa tunneling e whakarato ana i te hononga IPv6 ki nga whatunga IPv4. E hiahiatia ana mo te hononga Xbox Live me etahi tono hoa-ki-hoa. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_ThisPC: Whakaatus or hides the This PC icon on your desktop for quick access to drives and devices.
TweakWhy_ThumbnailCache: Ka tiakina e Windows nga arokite karakōnui ki te konae pātengi raraunga huna kia tere ake te tirotiro kōpaki. Ko te whakakore i tenei keteroki e kore e penapena ki runga kōpae.
TweakWhy_Thumbnails: Whakaatus image and video previews as thumbnails in Explorer instead of generic file type icons. Disabling shows icons only.
TweakWhy_ThumbsDBOnNetwork: Ka waihangahia e Windows nga konae Thumbs.db huna ki nga tiri whatunga ki te keteroki karakōnui. Ko te whakakore i enei konae kei te hanga ki nga waahi whatunga.
TweakWhy_TitleBarColor: Taea nga pae taitara matapihi kia rite ki to tae nako Windows, kaua e whakaatu ma te ma, ma te hina ranei.
TweakWhy_TrayIcons: Whakaatus all notification area icons in the system tray instead of hiding overflow icons behind the expand arrow.
TweakWhy_UnknownNetworks: Ka tautuhi i te kōtaha whatunga taunoa ka hoatu ki nga hononga whatunga hou, kore mohio ranei i te wa tuatahi ka kitea. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_UnpinTaskbarShortcuts: Tangohia nga pokatata paetaumahi kua kohia
TweakWhy_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: Ka hoatu he huinga tautuhinga kaupapa here haumarutanga mo Adobe Reader DC tae atu ki te aratau pare, te tirohanga pare, me te whakakore i nga ahuatanga kapua me te paetukutuku. He huringa morearea nui tera pea he uaua, he kore ranei e taea te huri.
TweakWhy_UpdateAutoDownload: Ka whakahaere mena ka tango aunoa a Windows Update i nga whakahōutanga kei muri. Ko te whakakore ka taea e koe te whiriwhiri i te wa e tango ai i nga whakahou. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_UpdateCipherSuites: Ka tautuhi i nga huinga cipher SCHANNEL ki nga momo AES-256 me AES-128 kaha. Ka whakarite whakamunatanga kaha mo nga hononga TLS katoa. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_UpdateDesktopRegistry: Ka tango i te ata korero iti ka puta i runga i te papamahi i te wa e hohe ana nga pepapātū Windows Spotlight.
TweakWhy_UpdateDotNetStrongAuth: Forces .NET Framework 4.x me 2.x ki te whakamahi i te TLS-taunoa me te whakamunatanga kaha. Ka aukati i nga taupānga tawhito .NET kia hoki mai ki nga tohu tohu ngoikore. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_UpdateDriver: Ka whakahaere mena ka tango aunoa a Windows Update me te whakauru i nga taraiwa taputapu. Ko te whakakore ka taea e koe te whakahaere a-ringa i nga taraiwa. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_UpdateEventLogSize: Whakanuia ai te morahi o te rangitaki takahanga Windows ki te 1 MP. Ka awhina i te pupuri i nga huihuinga arotake i mua i te tuhiruatanga o nga tuhinga tawhito.
TweakWhy_UpdateKeyExchanges: Whakamarautias Diffie-Hellman, ECDH, and PKCS key exchange algorithms in SCHANNEL. Ensures forward-secure key exchange is available for TLS connections. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Ina whakahohea, ka tirotirohia e Windows Update me te whakauru i nga whakahōutanga mo etahi atu rorohiko Microsoft kua whakauruhia ki te taha o nga whakahou Windows.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSProducts: When enabled, Windows Update also checks for updates to other Microsoft products like Koreice. Disabling limits updates to Windows only.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSRT: Mana whakahaere mehemea ka tukuna e Windows Update te Karapa Utauta Tango Pūmanawa Kino. Ko te whakakore i te kore e panaia ma te Windows Update. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_UpdatePowershell: Ko te PowerShell 7 he anga whakawhiti-whakawhiti hou me te pai ake o nga mahi me nga ahuatanga i runga i te Windows PowerShell 5.1 i hangaia. He hono ki te takahuri PS7 Telemetry.
TweakWhy_UpdateProtocols: Ko te TLS 1.0 me te 1.1 kua whakakorehia me nga whakaraerae e mohiotia ana. Ko te whakakore i a raatau ka whakapakeke te punaha ki te BEAST, PODLE, me nga whakaeke e pa ana. Me mahi te whakaahei mo te hototahitanga tuku iho.
TweakWhy_UpdateRegistryPaths: Ka waihanga i nga ara rehita kua ngaro e hiahiatia ana e etahi atu takawiri whakapakeke i mua i te rere. He taahiraa nui tenei kaore he paanga e anga ana ki te kaiwhakamahi.
TweakWhy_UpdateRestart: Ka aukati i a Windows kia kore e whakaara aunoa i muri i te whakaurutanga o nga whakahōutanga me te kore to whakauru. Ka hoatu ki a koe te mana whakahaere ina puta nga whakaaraara.
TweakWhy_UseStoreOpenWith: Whakaatus or hides the Look for an app in the Microsoft Store option that appears in the Open With dialog for unassociated file types.
TweakWhy_UWPAccountInfo: Whakahaerehia mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te uru atu ki to ingoa putea, pikitia, me etahi atu korero putea.
TweakWhy_UWPApps: Ka whakatuwhera i tetahi korero whiriwhiri hei tango, whakaora ranei i nga taupānga Toa Windows kua tohua. Ko etahi o nga tangohanga he huarahi kotahi, me nga ara whakaora tautoko ka hiahia tonu a Microsoft Store, winget, me te whakauru-a-ringa ranei i te whai-ake. He mahi morearea nui tenei, kaua ki te takahuri ngawari.
TweakWhy_UWPCalendar: Whakahaerehia mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te panui me te tuhi ki o raraunga maramataka.
TweakWhy_UWPCallHistory: Ka whakahaere mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te panui i to hitori waea.
TweakWhy_UWPContacts: Ka whakahaere mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te uru ki to rarangi hoapaki.
TweakWhy_UWPDiagInfo: Whakahaerehia mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te kohi korero tātari mo to taputapu me tona ahuatanga.
TweakWhy_UWPEmail: Whakahaerehia mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te panui me te tuku imeera mo koe.
TweakWhy_UWPFileSystem: Whakahaerehia mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te uru atu ki nga konae kei runga i to punaha konae kei tua atu i o raatau ake kōpaki taupānga. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_UWPMessaging: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te panui me te tuku karere kuputuhi.
TweakWhy_UWPNotifications: Ka whakahaere mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te tuku whakamohiotanga ki te pokapū panui Windows.
TweakWhy_UWPOtherDevices: Whakahaerehia mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te uru atu ki etahi atu taputapu takirua kaore i hipokina e nga waahanga motuhake ake.
TweakWhy_UWPPhoneCalls: Whakahaerehia mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te hanga me te whakahaere waea waea.
TweakWhy_UWPRadios: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te whakahaere i te Nihokikorangi me etahi atu taputapu reo irirangi ahokore.
TweakWhy_UWPSwapFile: Ko te konae whakawhiti UWP (swapfile.sys) e whakamahia ana e nga taupānga Toa Windows mo te wharangi mahara mariko. Ko te whakakore i te mokowā kōpae ki te kore koe e whakamahi i nga taupānga Toa. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_UWPTasks: Whakahaerehia mena ka taea e nga taupānga UWP te uru atu ki to rarangi mahi me to rarangi mahi.
TweakWhy_UWPVoiceActivation: Ka whakahaere mena ka taea te whakahohe nga taupānga UWP ma te whakamahi i nga whakahau reo kei muri.
TweakWhy_VerboseStatus: Whakaatus detailed status messages during Windows startup and shutdown instead of just the generic loading spinner.
TweakWhy_VisualFX: Ka whakahaere i te katoa o nga tautuhinga whakakitenga. Ma te mahinga ka mono i nga pakiwaituhi kia pai ake te ahua. Ma te ahua ka taea nga paanga katoa.
TweakWhy_WAPPush: Ka whiwhi te ratonga karere WAP Push i nga karere mai i nga kaikawe waea. He uaua ki te PC kaore i hono ki te whatunga waea.
TweakWhy_WebLangList: Syncs your preferred language list to a Microsoft server so web content can match your preferences. Monokia for more privacy.
TweakWhy_WebSearch: Ka whakauru i nga hua tukutuku Bing ki te pae rapu Windows. Ko te whakakore i te rapu punaha ka whakaatu i nga konae me nga tautuhinga rohe anake.
TweakWhy_WhatsNewInWindows: Whakaatus banners and prompts highlighting new Windows features after updates. Monokia to suppress these notifications.
TweakWhy_WiFiSense: Ka taea e WiFi Sense te tiri aunoa i to kupuhipa WiFi ki o hoapaki. Ko te whakakore i tenei whanonga tiri.
TweakWhy_Win32LongPathLimit: Tango i te 260-puāhua tepe ara kōnae mōrahi mō ngā taupānga Win32. E hiahiatia ana mo etahi taputapu whanaketanga me nga hanganga kōpaki uaua.
TweakWhy_WindowsCapabilities: Whakatuwheratia ai nga korero mo nga ahuatanga hei taapiri, hei tango ranei i nga kaha o Windows penei i nga kete reo me nga taputapu RSAT. Ka hiahia pea te Whakaora ki te uru ki te Windows Update, ki nga konae puna, ki te whakaara ano i te whai ake, no reira me waiho hei whakahaere mokihi, kaua ki te takahuri ngawari.
TweakWhy_WindowsColorMode: Sets whether the Windows shell (taskbar, Start Menu, action center) uses Pōuri or Marama mode.
TweakWhy_WindowsFeatures: Whakatuwheratia ai te Whakahohe i nga ahuatanga o te Matapihi ki te whakaweto ranei i nga korero kia taea ai te whakakore ranei i nga waahanga o te Matapihi penei i a Hyper-V, Telnet ranei. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_WindowsGameMode: Ma tenei e whakahaere te whakatakotoranga Aratau Keemu Windows i roto, ehara i te rerengamahi korero a Baseline. Ko te Aratau Keemu Windows te kaupapa matua o nga tukanga keemu me te pehi i nga mahi papamuri. Ko etahi o nga kaiwhakamahi ka whakakorehia mo te rere, te tuhi ranei i te pumau ka taea e nga huringa matua te whakaheke i te encoder.
TweakWhy_WindowsLatestUpdate: Ka whakauru i tenei PC ki te whiwhi whakahōutanga Windows i te wa ka tukuna, kaua ki te tatari mo te whakaputanga haere. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_WindowsManageDefaultPrinter: Tukua a Windows ki te tautuhi aunoa i to kaituhi kua whakamahia tata nei hei taunoa. Ko te whakakore i to pūreretā taunoa kua tohua ā-ringa kia mau tonu.
TweakWhy_WindowsSandbox: He mihini mariko taratahi mama mo te whakahaere haumaru i nga tono kore pono me te kore e raru i to punaha matua. Me Windows Pro, teitei ake ranei.
TweakWhy_WindowsScriptHost: Ka whakahaere mehemea ka taea e Windows te whakahaere i nga konae tuhinga .vbs me .js. Ko te whakakore i enei momo tuhinga ka kore e mahia ina pawhiri-ruatia. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_WindowsTips: Ka whakaatu a Windows i nga tohutohu pahū-ake me nga whakaaro i a koe e mahi ana. Ma te mono ka mutu enei aukati.
TweakWhy_WindowsWelcomeExperience: Whakaatus a full-screen welcome page after major Windows updates highlighting new features. Monokia to skip this screen.
TweakWhy_WPBT: Ko te WPBT he ripanga firmware e tuku ana i nga kaihanga ki te whakahaere i nga rorohiko i te wa e whakaoho ana a Windows. Ko te mono ka aukati i te whakahaere aunoa i nga kaitahuri kua werohia e te kaiwhakanao. He iti te tupono o tenei huringa, ka pa ki etahi rerenga mahi.
TweakWhy_XboxGameBar: Ko te Pae Keemu Xbox he whakakikorua i roto i te keemu (Win+G) mo nga whakaahua whakaahua, te hopu ataata, me te aro turuki i nga mahi a te punaha.
TweakWhy_XboxGameTips: Whakaatus onboarding tips and hints inside the Xbox Game Bar overlay. Monokia if you are already familiar with Game Bar.
